source_notes: Group-stage fixtures are built from the existing FIFA API-derived worldCupData.js snapshot already used by world-cup.html.
OpenFootball 2026 worldcup.json is used as a secondary cross-check and to supply matchday labels and local UTC offsets.

Knockout-stage fixtures are not included yet because team names are placeholders until the tournament is played. Add them later as match slots or as completed fixtures with null teams, depending on the app need.
home_team and away_team mean the source-listed first and second teams, not a confirmed sporting home advantage.

fixtures.source_note: Primary fixture values are from the existing worldCupData.js FIFA API-derived snapshot. Matchday and local UTC offset are cross-checked from OpenFootball 2026 worldcup.json. FIFA wins if sources conflict.
